articles.title: Tesla Balances Autopilot Scrutiny Robotaxis And China Risks For Investors
articles.description: Tesla is facing multiple regulatory and legal challenges in California tied to its Autopilot and Full Self-Driving marketing, including a dispute with the DMV and an ongoing class-action discrimination case. The company is pushing ahead with its Cybercab robotaxi plans and the Optimus Gen 3 robot, even as senior executives depart and some operations encounter setbacks. In China, record-low delivery times and extended financing deals point to tougher competition and softer demand, while the...

articles.title: Tesla Autonomy Setbacks Test Robotaxi Hopes And Long Term Story
articles.description:
Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) is confronting weaker global demand and tougher competition, including losing its position as the top-selling EV maker to BYD.
The company is dealing with a series of regulatory and legal challenges tied to its Autopilot and Full Self Driving marketing, as well as disputes with California's DMV and stricter oversight after a major liability verdict.
Tesla's Cybercab program manager has departed as the company pushes ahead with autonomous vehicle and robotaxi plans,...

articles.title: Elon Musk 'Highly Confident' Starship V3 Will Achieve 'Full Reusability,' But There's One Catch: 'SpaceX Will Only Try...'
articles.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk shared that he believes the Starship V3 rocket would achieve full reusability as lunar goals take center stage. Starship Will Achieve Full Reusability In a post on the social media platform X on Thursday, Musk quoted a post by SpaceX sharing that the Starship V3 was headed for ground tests. articles.title: Tesla increases Cybertruck AWD price to $70,000 after creating artificial urgency
articles.description: Tesla raised the Cybertruck AWD price from $60,000 to $70,000 after Musk created artificial demand with a 10-day deadline.

articles.title: Tesla Robotaxi Rival Waymo Now Operates In 10 Cities, Touts 200 Million Autonomous Miles Driven: Here's How Other Companies Fair
articles.description: As Waymo announced expansion to 10 cities for its autonomous ride-hailing service, here's how the Robotaxi race is progressing.
